title: eulophia chlorotica
intro: Eulophia chlorotica is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, as the plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The roots of Eulophia chlorotica are reported to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, and are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
